reasoning: The primary limiter is the 9.3% power decline from 5 to 20 minutes, indicating poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Your last ride was at 76% FTP, showing steady aerobic conditioning, but we need targeted efforts. These over-unders will simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop, especially on the key Sundance → Cascade Springs segment.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x [6 min at 242-256W, 4 min at 201-218W] to enhance lactate threshold and replicate Alpine Loop climbing demands
